'''鈭歬-t-dh''' ('''kakatadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:justifie|justifie]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-t-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:justifie|justifie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-t-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kakatadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikatadh|thikatadh]] || [[word:jikatadh|jikatadh]] || [[word:shikatadh|shikatadh]] || [[word:kikatadh|kikatadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukatadh|thuthukatadh]] || [[word:jujukatadh|jujukatadh]] || [[word:shushukatadh|shushukatadh]] || [[word:kukukatadh|kukukatadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukatadh|thukatadh]] || [[word:jukatadh|jukatadh]] || [[word:shukatadh|shukatadh]] || [[word:kukatadh|kukatadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukatadh|thukatadh]] || [[word:jukatadh|jukatadh]] || [[word:shukatadh|shukatadh]] || [[word:kukatadh|kukatadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekatadh|thekatadh]] || [[word:jekatadh|jekatadh]] || [[word:shekatadh|shekatadh]] || [[word:kekatadh|kekatadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokatadh|thothokatadh]] || [[word:jojokatadh|jojokatadh]] || [[word:shoshokatadh|shoshokatadh]] || [[word:kokokatadh|kokokatadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokatadh|thokatadh]] || [[word:jokatadh|jokatadh]] || [[word:shokatadh|shokatadh]] || [[word:kokatadh|kokatadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokatadh|thokatadh]] || [[word:jokatadh|jokatadh]] || [[word:shokatadh|shokatadh]] || [[word:kokatadh|kokatadh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:katadh|katadh]] || [[word:katadh|katadh]] || [[word:katadh|katadh]] || [[word:katadh|katadh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:katadh|katadh]] || [[word:katadh|katadh]] || [[word:katadh|katadh]] || [[word:katadh|katadh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:katadh|katadh]] || [[word:katadh|katadh]] || [[word:katadh|katadh]] || [[word:katadh|katadh]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:katadh|katadh]] || [[word:katadh|katadh]] || [[word:katadh|katadh]] || [[word:katadh|katadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙katadh|th忙katadh]] || [[word:j忙katadh|j忙katadh]] || [[word:sh忙katadh|sh忙katadh]] || [[word:k忙katadh|k忙katadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakatadh|thathakatadh]] || [[word:jajakatadh|jajakatadh]] || [[word:shashakatadh|shashakatadh]] || [[word:kakakatadh|kakakatadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakatadh|thakatadh]] || [[word:jakatadh|jakatadh]] || [[word:shakatadh|shakatadh]] || [[word:kakatadh|kakatadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakatadh|thakatadh]] || [[word:jakatadh|jakatadh]] || [[word:shakatadh|shakatadh]] || [[word:kakatadh|kakatadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakatadh|shakatadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakatadh|goshakatadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakatadh|gokishakatadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakatadhn眉|shakatadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakatadhnkn眉|goshakatadhnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakatadhn眉|gokishakatadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakatadhsh毛|shakatadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakatadhnksh毛|goshakatadhnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakatadhsh毛|gokishakatadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakatadhro|shakatadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakatadhnkro|goshakatadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakatadhro|gokishakatadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakatadhmu|shakatadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakatadhnkmu|goshakatadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakatadhmu|gokishakatadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakatadhsher|shakatadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakatadhnksher|goshakatadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakatadhsher|gokishakatadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakatadhng|shakatadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakatadhnkng|goshakatadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakatadhng|gokishakatadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakatadhya|shakatadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakatadhnkya|goshakatadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakatadhya|gokishakatadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakatadhyam|shakatadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakatadhnkyam|goshakatadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakatadhyam|gokishakatadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakatadhn眉sh毛|shakatadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakatadhnkn眉sh毛|goshakatadhnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakatadhn眉sh毛|gokishakatadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakatadhn眉ro|shakatadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakatadhnkn眉ro|goshakatadhnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakatadhn眉ro|gokishakatadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakatadhn眉mu|shakatadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakatadhnkn眉mu|goshakatadhnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakatadhn眉mu|gokishakatadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakatadhsh毛n眉|shakatadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakatadhnksh毛n眉|goshakatadhnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakatadhsh毛n眉|gokishakatadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakatadhsh毛ro|shakatadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakatadhnksh毛ro|goshakatadhnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakatadhsh毛ro|gokishakatadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakatadhsh毛mu|shakatadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakatadhnksh毛mu|goshakatadhnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakatadhsh毛mu|gokishakatadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakatadhron眉|shakatadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakatadhnkron眉|goshakatadhnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakatadhron眉|gokishakatadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakatadhrosh毛|shakatadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakatadhnkrosh毛|goshakatadhnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakatadhrosh毛|gokishakatadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakatadhromu|shakatadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakatadhnkromu|goshakatadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakatadhromu|gokishakatadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakatadhmun眉|shakatadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakatadhnkmun眉|goshakatadhnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakatadhmun眉|gokishakatadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakatadhmush毛|shakatadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakatadhnkmush毛|goshakatadhnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakatadhmush毛|gokishakatadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakatadhmuro|shakatadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakatadhnkmuro|goshakatadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakatadhmuro|gokishakatadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
